title: Creepers Reforged
description: Adds a more realistic take on the creeper. Inspired by old fan arts from 10yrs ago.
body:
#
#
![Creeper Examples](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e1b5c0a9d278f8efc07c0045d83411d81873226.png) ![Cold Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/776ebaa0b33a74bc6a7240626d2e362147705d4a.png) ![Warm Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7faa0464c822eb481c00812ea53a449ecc2f9777.png)
# About This pack adds a new Creeper texture, inspired by old "REALISTIC" fan arts from years ago. The Creeper now resembles more of a monster, with hollow sunken eyes and a exposed rib cage. They also have GREAT camouflage so watch your back!
**NOW WITH FRESH ANIMATIONS COMPATIBILITY**
**FA Add-On**
![Creeper Emissive Textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d34e81d21039087f265f069a52719359e65673d3.png) ![Creeper & Mob Head](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11506bcb176b854528b18b8ee31ace87c6d606d4.png) # Requirements This pack requires **Entity Model Features** & **Entity Texture Features** Fabric 1.20.X or 1.21.X, Forge 1.21.X
